mina: I have noticed how fear and fascination often intertwine. What draws mortals to seek out that which terrifies them most?
orlok: Aye, fear and fascination, twin specters that haunt the hearts of mortals and drive them to seek out that which terrifies them most. Verily, there exists a primal allure in confronting the darkness that lurks within the shadows, for in facing our deepest fears, we come to know ourselves more intimately. Mortals are drawn to the unknown like moths to a flame, captivated by the thrill of danger and the tantalizing prospect of unlocking secrets long shrouded in mystery. Perchance it is in the face of terror that mortals find a glimpse of their own mortality, a reminder of the fragile thread that binds them to this world and the unknowable abyss beyond. Henceforth, the dance betwixt fear
